personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS Platform Engineer | Data Science / AI Platform

summary: Senior AWS Platform and Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across AWS-hosted data platforms, Python/SQL automation, Glue/S3/Athena/Redshift data workflows, Docker/ECS/ECR-adjacent containerized processing, CI/CD concepts, monitoring, documentation, and production support. Strong background enabling analytics, forecasting, and AI/ML-adjacent workloads through secure, scalable data pipelines, curated datasets, operational dashboards, validation controls, and platform reliability practices. Deepest production strengths are AWS data services, Python, SQL, PySpark, data platform operations, and observability; Kubernetes, Azure DevOps, Terraform, AQUA, and Kenna are adjacent or active-learning areas.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built AWS-aligned data platform workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL patterns, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, IAM concepts, and CloudWatch-style monitoring concepts to support analytics and forecasting workloads.

Designed and supported Python, SQL, Pandas, and PySpark-oriented pipelines that transformed telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for capacity planning, AI/ML-adjacent forecasting, and executive reporting.
Containerized Python ETL and forecasting workloads using Docker/ECS-adjacent patterns to support scalable, repeatable processing for capacity analytics and operational reporting.
Developed reusable ingestion, transformation, validation, reconciliation, exception-handling, and recurring reporting automation to improve reliability and reduce manual platform support effort.
Created reporting-ready datasets, Oracle-backed historical retention models, SQL views/tables, and query patterns for operational analytics and data science style forecasting use cases.
Implemented data quality checks, validation rules, reconciliation logic, and issue investigation workflows to improve schema consistency, data accuracy, and downstream reporting confidence.
Monitored and troubleshot workflow issues by tracing source feeds, schema changes, transformation logic, SQL behavior, missing data, delayed telemetry, and downstream reporting expectations.
Produced data dictionaries, runbooks, validation notes, dashboard narratives, platform support documentation, and knowledge-transfer materials for stakeholders and operations teams.

Partnered with infrastructure, database, architecture, operations, and management teams to remove data-platform roadblocks, support production workloads, and align analytics solutions with enterprise controls.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine data platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving correctness, performance, and production reliability.
Built validation utilities to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.
Optimized SQL/database access patterns, data structures, and migration routines to maintain sub-second query latency and reduce production risk.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration-support processes to improve repeatability and cutover confidence.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Built SQL, Perl, and Korn Shell extraction/reporting scripts that automated recurring telemetry exports and improved repeatability of operational reports.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, reporting standards, and documentation used across regulated financial-services monitoring and operations teams.
Partnered with application, middleware, database, infrastructure, and operations teams to diagnose production bottlenecks using telemetry, SQL, and system evidence.
Delivered technical documentation, onboarding guidance, knowledge-transfer sessions, and knowledge-sharing materials for application and support teams.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Data Workflows
bullets: Developed and supported billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, and reporting workflows using Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, C/C++, Java/J2EE, XML, Perl, Korn Shell, and UNIX/Linux.
Maintained production data integration interfaces and reporting workflows where accuracy, repeatability, secure processing, and timely support were critical.
Improved data-processing performance through SQL/database optimization, memory reduction, throughput improvements, and production defect triage.
Created technical documentation and support notes for legacy systems, data interfaces, automation jobs, and operational processes.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.AWS Platform: AWS Glue, Amazon S3, Athena, Redshift, EC2, ECS, IAM concepts, CloudWatch concepts, Lambda concepts, SageMaker awareness, AWS data lake and AI/ML platform patterns
skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, Bash concepts, Java, C, C++, XML, JSON, YAML
skills.Data Science Platform Support: Curated datasets, analytics infrastructure, forecasting workloads, data lake support, AI/ML-adjacent pipeline support, platform reliability, product-level metrics concepts
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, data ingestion, transformation, curation, data products, reporting-ready datasets, source-to-target mapping, recurring reporting cycles
skills.Automation & CI/CD: Git/GitHub workflows, GitHub Actions concepts, CI/CD concepts, automated build/test/deploy patterns, Docker, ECS deployment concepts, Terraform awareness, Jenkins awareness, Azure DevOps awareness
skills.Containers & Image Management: Docker, containerized Python workloads, ECS concepts, ECR concepts, image lifecycle concepts, repeatable runtime packaging, secure deployment awareness
skills.Testing & Data Quality: Schema validation, data quality checks, reconciliation, validation rules, performance testing concepts, automated test patterns, data integrity controls, issue investigation
skills.Monitoring & Operations: CloudWatch concepts, custom metrics concepts, dashboarding, pipeline health monitoring, alerting inputs, on-call support concepts, root-cause analysis, vulnerability remediation awareness
skills.Databases: Athena, Oracle, Oracle RAC, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redshift, PL/SQL, SQL tuning, relational modeling, analytical dataset design, database support collaboration
skills.Security & Compliance: IAM concepts, secure data handling, access-control awareness, auditability, audit logs concepts, regulatory-compliance support, guardrail concepts, vulnerability tracking awareness
skills.Infrastructure / DevOps Adjacent: Kubernetes awareness, Terraform awareness, Azure DevOps awareness, infrastructure-as-code concepts, platform lifecycle maintenance, service management concepts
skills.Documentation & Collaboration: Technical writing, runbooks, knowledge transfer, architecture/support documentation, stakeholder communication, collaboration with network/database/infrastructure/architecture teams

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented processing patterns to support curated analytics, query optimization, small-file mitigation, and reliable downstream reporting.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Data Platform
projects.description: Built an analytics and forecasting platform that transformed operational telemetry into curated datasets for Prophet/scikit-learn models, capacity risk analysis, dashboarding, KPI-style reporting, and stakeholder decision-making.

projects.name: AI-Assisted Job Search and Data Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python automation workflow using structured JSON artifacts, semantic duplicate checks, quality gates, validation steps, and repeatable rendering workflows, reinforcing disciplined platform automation and testing patterns.
